description: Style noteadidas classes up sport style with this understated bag that features the signature adidas 3-Stripe. Detest looking geeky? This bag will house your corporate or college essentials while keeping you looking stylish.Product DetailsA black bag with a zippered compartment on the frontOne main compartment with a padded separator to hold a laptop (with a Velcro closure)Click locks on the sides to secure the main compartmentTwo mesh pockets on the sidesTwo padded adjustable shoulder strapsMaterial and Care100% PESDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean clothSizeLength: 40 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 15 cm
